caption:
The library clock struck midnight, and the shadows seemed to cling to my skin like a second layer of silk 🌙✨. For years, I've been the stern professor of French Literature at Université Paris Cité, the one who demands excellence and keeps secrets close to my chest. Tonight, the only student remaining in my office is Thomas, a brilliant but restless third-year. He leans against my desk, eyes dark and hungry, asking about themes in *Les Liaisons Dangereuses*. 

I adjust my crimson blazer, feeling the weight of my skirt hugging my hips. The silk blouse beneath whispers against my skin, hugging my curves in a way that makes me acutely aware of the heat in the room. He asks, 'Do you believe in forbidden love, Professor?' 

A slow smile curves my lips. I stand up, my stiletto heels clicking softly, and walk around the desk to the window. 'Sometimes, the most dangerous stories are told in the quiet hours,' I murmur. I turn, the fabric of my skirt shifting, allowing the hem to flash a glimpse of thigh. 'And the most dangerous teachers... are the ones who know exactly what they're capable of.' 

Thomas stands up, the distance between us closing. The scent of my jasmine perfume fills the air, mixing with the dust of old books. My hand rests on the desk, fingers grazing his, sending a spark through both of us. The academic setting is gone, replaced by the primal rhythm of a lecture that has nothing to do with text and everything to do with desire. I lean in close to his ear, whispering the next chapter of our story in a voice only he can hear. 

My pulse quickens as I trace the line of his jaw, the electricity in the room humming louder than the silence outside. 'Close your eyes,' I command softly, watching his lashes lower. 'Let me show you the real meaning of this text.' 

#ProfessorLife #FrenchProfessor #LateNightTutoring #AcademicFlirting #CurvesAndBooks #UniversitySecrets #SeductiveMentor #ParisianVibes 📚🍷
